# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "networkSecurityGroupName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "devTeamNsg"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('networkSecurityGroupName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP-From-Trusted-IPs",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 100,
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [
                "203.0.113.10/32",
                "198.51.100.20/32"
              ],
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH-From-Trusted-IPs",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 110,
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [
                "203.0.113.10/32",
                "198.51.100.20/32"
              ],
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP-From-Internet",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 120,
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "Internet",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS-From-Internet",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 130,
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "Internet",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "networkSecurityGroupResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('networkSecurityGroupName'))]"
    }
  }
}
